title: Mask thermal paths
body:
/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Mask /proc/interrupts and /sys/devices/system/cpu/<cpuX>/thermal_throttle by default

Fixes #6073 


```release-note
 /proc/interrupts and /sys/devices/system/cpu/*/thermal_throttle are masked by default
```
